display_name: Alpha Sherman Player Character From Reference V1

runtime_contract.rejection_reason_for_gameplay_animation: Fused static Meshy sculpture; no separable hull/turret/barrel/tread bindings.
runtime_contract.acceptance_gate: Rejected by human visual review; must be replaced by UV-aware Alpha texture/retexture on accepted base.

red_build.observed: Human visual review rejected the candidate as a red highlighter: beige/generated tank with loud red banding, no disciplined Alpha personality, no credible field-painted white A/chalk story, and no usable texture language.
red_build.failed_relationship: Alpha personality must read through texture language, not a simple red stripe/highlighter band.
red_build.cause: Image-to-3D from the character-sheet reference overfit the recognition color and regenerated a fused static tank instead of applying nuanced UV-aware identity texture to the accepted base.
red_build.next_valid_route: Use Meshy Web/model-texture retexture if available, or build a UV-aware texture pipeline for the accepted vanilla base. Do not use runtime red planes, geometry decals, or another character-sheet image-to-3D pass as proof.
